triggers.description: At the beginning of your upkeep, you may look at the top card of your library. If it's a creature card, you may reveal it and put a quest counter on Quest for CARDNAME.
At the beginning of each end step, if there are three or more quest counters on CARDNAME, you may put a Kraken, Leviathan, Octopus, or Serpent creature card from your hand onto the battlefield.
